name: BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - BTG Pactual Deuda Activa Plus Fund
summary: BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - BTG Pactual Deuda Activa Plus Fund is an actively managed debt investment fund. It is managed by BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos and aims to generate returns through active management of a debt portfolio.
